- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.
- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
      Project type: plain static website.
      Language: HTML, CSS, JavaScript.
      Frameworks: none.
      Product scope: Spanish-language team app with team overview, roster, player statistics, matches, and standings.
- [x] Scaffold the Project
      Created the project structure in the current directory with the app shell, data files, importer entry point, package manifest, and README.
- [x] Customize the Project
      Added a responsive single-page app structure tailored to team, players, matches, and standings.
- [x] Install Required Extensions
      No extensions were required by the setup information.
- [x] Compile the Project
      Installed dependencies, installed the Playwright Chromium runtime, and validated the importer and frontend diagnostics.
- [x] Create and Run Task
      Created and started a background task that serves the static app on port 4173.
- [ ] Launch the Project
      Waiting for user confirmation.
- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete
      Updated README.md and this checklist to reflect the current project state and workflow.
- Work through each checklist item systematically.
- Keep communication concise and focused.
- Follow development best practices.
